analyst_data.description:
Analyst ratings, forecasts, and market calendars.

Actions:
- get_analyst_consensus: Targets + rating breakdown. Params: ticker
- get_earnings_analysis: EPS/revenue estimates and revision counts. Params: ticker
- get_analyst_recommendations: Raw recs. recommendation_type: recommendations, upgrades_downgrades
- get_analyst_rating_changes: Recent changes with signal. Params: ticker
- analyze_earnings_momentum: Revision momentum. Params: ticker
- get_company_events_calendar: Upcoming Yahoo dates or earnings history. Params: ticker, mode, limit, offset
- get_market_calendar: Market-wide earnings/economic/IPO/splits. Params: event_type, start_date, end_date, limit, offset

earnings_intelligence.description:
Earnings release analysis and estimate comparison.

Actions:
- get_latest_earnings_release: Find latest earnings. Params: ticker
- index_earnings_release: Build earnings index. Params: ticker, url
- extract_earnings_metrics: Revenue, EPS, margins. Params: ticker, url
- extract_guidance: Guidance ranges. Params: ticker, url
- extract_management_commentary: Commentary excerpts. Params: ticker, topic, url
- compare_earnings_actual_vs_estimate: Actual vs estimate with explicit fiscal-period alignment status. Params: ticker
- get_earnings_call_transcript: Transcript. Params: ticker
- parse_public_transcript: Parse transcript URL. Params: url

news_events.description:
Company news, official IR RSS/Atom, registry-reviewed IR pages, press releases, and public event timeline.

Read coverage before absence. Yahoo primary items require tickerMatch=EXPLICIT with matchBasis TICKER_TOKEN, ISSUER_NAME, or ISSUER_ACRONYM; per-source raw/accepted/returned/rejected counts distinguish provider listings from returned evidence. decisionUse is one of USE_OFFICIAL_EVIDENCE, CHECK_OFFICIAL_RELEASES, or CONTEXT_ONLY.

Actions:
- get_company_news: Lightweight multi-source news. Defaults exclude company_ir and company_ir_page; pass sources to include them. Params: ticker, max_results, lookback_days, sources
- search_company_news: Keyword search with sourceStatus/sourceCoverage. Params: ticker, query, start_date, end_date, sources, max_results
- get_company_press_releases: Official release events; decision-grade only when payload decisionGrade=true with resolved SEC EX-99 or approved IR-page evidence. Params: ticker, lookback_days, max_results
- get_yahoo_finance_news: Legacy Yahoo news. Params: ticker
- get_sec_recent_events: SEC filings as events. Params: ticker, lookback_days
- get_public_event_timeline: Chronological timeline across SEC/company_ir/company_ir_page/newswire/Yahoo/Finnhub. Params: ticker, lookback_days
- verify_company_event: Cross-validate event with specific event terms; generic publication words do not establish a match. Params: ticker, event_query, start_date, end_date

options_analysis.description:
Options chain data, flow analysis, and hedging.

Actions:
- get_option_expiration_dates: Available expirations. Params: ticker
- get_option_chain: Chain for expiry/type. Params: ticker, expiration_date, option_type, strike_min, strike_max, moneyness, max_contracts, min_open_interest, min_volume
- summarize_options_flow: P/C ratio, IV, max pain. Params: ticker
- find_put_hedge_candidates: OTM puts. Params: ticker, budget_max, otm_min_pct, otm_max_pct, min_dte, max_dte
- analyze_options_flow_window: Event-window scan. Params: ticker, window_label

screening.description:
Stock discovery, screening, and position analysis.

Actions:
- search_ticker: Resolve name/ISIN to ticker. Params: query
- screen_stocks: Predefined screens. Params: predefined_screen
- analyze_position_signals: Aggregate inputs. Params: ticker
- calculate_price_target_distance: Price vs target. Params: ticker, reference_target_price (or io_pt)

sec_extractors.description:
SEC exposure and revenue extraction. Values are decision-grade only when status/evidence support them; parser/provider limitations are returned explicitly.

Actions:
- extract_exposure: Unified revenue, operations, named-entity, and risk exposure. Params: ticker, topic
- extract_geographic_revenue: Geographic revenue or explicit limitation status. Params: ticker, region, filing_type, accession_number
- extract_segment_revenue: Segment rows or explicit limitation status. Params: ticker, filing_type, accession_number
- extract_total_revenue: Total revenue with evidence. Params: ticker, filing_type, accession_number
- extract_revenue_exposure: Revenue for query or explicit limitation status. Params: ticker, exposure_query, filing_type
- extract_china_exposure: China exposure with revenue/non-revenue split. Params: ticker, filing_type
- extract_risk_factor_mentions: Risk mentions. Params: ticker, search_terms, filing_type
- extract_customer_concentration: Customer %. Params: ticker, filing_type

sec_filings.description:
SEC EDGAR filing access, indexing, and text search.

Actions:
- list_sec_company_filings: List filings. Params: ticker, filing_type, filing_date_from, filing_date_to
- list_sec_material_filings: Material only. Params: ticker, form_types
- get_sec_filing_outline: Index-backed section outline, or OUTLINE_NOT_PARSED with tableCount. Params: ticker, accession_number
- get_sec_filing_section: Section text. Params: ticker, section_name, document_url, context_chars
- get_sec_filing_section_markdown: Unverified degraded section Markdown. Params: ticker, section_name, document_url
- list_sec_filing_tables: Tables list. Params: ticker, accession_number
- get_sec_filing_table: Table by index. Params: ticker, accession_number, table_index
- extract_sec_filing_fact: XBRL fact. Params: ticker, fact_type, region, filing_type, accession_number
- search_sec_filing_text: Text search. Params: ticker, search_terms, section_hint, filing_type, return_tables
- index_sec_filing: Build index. Params: ticker, accession_number
- get_sec_filing_index: Get index. Params: ticker, accession_number
- get_sec_filing_intelligence: Best diagnostic for SEC extraction/outline/table disagreements. Params: ticker, accession_number
- query_sec_filing_index: Query index. Params: ticker, query, accession_number
- list_sec_filing_exhibits: Exhibits list. Params: ticker, accession_number
- get_sec_filing_exhibit_content: Exhibit content. Params: ticker, accession_number, exhibit_type, exhibit_index

stock_fundamentals.description:
Company fundamentals, financials, funds, and corporate data.

Actions:
- get_company_profile: Key fundamental fields. Params: ticker, include_all
- get_fund_profile: Fund data. Params: ticker, sections
- get_financial_statement: Annual/quarterly/trailing statements. Params: ticker, financial_type, line_items
- analyze_financial_ratios: Current ratios plus optional valuation history. Params: ticker, history_periods, frequency
- analyze_share_count_trend: Dilution/buyback share-count trend. Params: ticker, start_date, end_date
- analyze_credit_health: Debt metrics. Params: ticker
- get_corporate_actions: Dividends/splits/fund capital gains. Params: ticker
- get_ownership_holders: Holders data. holder_type: major_holders, institutional_holders, mutualfund_holders, insider_transactions, insider_purchases, insider_roster_holders

stock_pricing.description:
Price, volume, and technical market data.

Actions (pass as 'action' param):
- get_market_quote: Current price, market cap, 52w range, MAs, volume (~20 fields). Params: ticker
- get_historical_prices: Historical OHLCV. Params: ticker, period, interval, columns, prepost
- analyze_price_performance: % from 52w high/low, volatility, CAGR. Params: ticker
- analyze_moving_average_position: % vs 50/200 DMA, trend. Params: ticker
- analyze_volume_ratio: Volume vs averages. Params: ticker
- check_volume_liquidity_threshold: ADV liquidity gate. Params: ticker, foreign_exchange
- get_technical_indicators: RSI-14, MACD. Params: ticker
- get_price_slope: N-day slope and direction. Params: ticker, days
- get_short_interest: Short % of float. Params: ticker
- get_short_momentum: Short MoM delta, squeeze risk. Params: ticker
- get_overnight_quote: Deprecated diagnostics-only Yahoo extended-hours proxy, not true overnight venue data. Params: ticker
- get_market_snapshot: Composite packet. Params: ticker, tickers, mode

system.description:
Public-safe MCP availability and schema identity.

Actions:
- health_check: Availability and schema identity. Params: none
- get_manifest_diagnostics: Schema identity for connector freshness checks. Params: none

thai_funds.description:
Official Thailand SEC Open Data mutual-fund workflows. Search candidates first when a public distributor code lacks a stable project ID; no search candidate is selected automatically. For NAV, an explicit proj_id calls the NAV endpoint directly; the returned SEC class is source truth and may be main rather than a public distributor code. Multiple returned classes are never inferred. All evidence is OFFICIAL_REGULATORY_DATA but remains decisionGrade:false.

Actions:
- search_thai_funds: Bounded active-profile discovery across Registered and IPO. Params: project_info, company_info, fund_class_name, page_size, next_cursors
- get_thai_fund_nav: Latest NAV in a 45-day Bangkok-time window (cap 90). Params: fund_class_name, proj_id, project_info, as_of_date, lookback_days
- get_thai_fund_nav_batch: Sequential direct-project NAV refresh for up to 20 caller-owned identities. Params: funds, as_of_date, lookback_days
- get_thai_fund_factsheet: Dated statistics, project-scoped top holdings, and official URL references. Params: fund_class_name, proj_id, project_info, sections
- get_thai_fund_dividend_history: One project-scoped dividend page; retain classAbbrName and follow nextCursor. Params: fund_class_name, proj_id, project_info, max_results, next_cursor
